titleStmt.title: SII 24.242: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 242. (A.R. No. 38 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records the order (terippu) issued in the 4th regnal year of the king from his camp at Kaṇṇaṉūr communicating the royal sanction to the remission of taxes on 5 vēli of land left out of the 30 vēli of which 25 had already been assi gned in favour of the bhaṭṭas of Ravivarma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam (No. 241).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭuEngraved below the following inscription in palimpsest.nālāvatu kaṇṇaṉūril Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppatiyil tirunāmattāl vaitta Akaram Iravivarmacaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukkum Ivvakarattu Eḻuntaruḷi
vitta nāyaṉār Iravi nārāyaṇap perumāḷukkum pala vṛttimāṉkaḷukkum Aṟpaci viṣuvattil Udaka pūrvamāka pūtāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta nilattukku nicca yippil kaḻittamaikkut terippu .
bhaṭṭarkaḷ per nūṟṟu Oṉpatukku yaṇa Iravi nārāyaṇap perumāḷukku rupattu nālukkum
Aṭaitta vaṭakarai Irā[ja*] rā[ja*] vaḷanāṭṭu kiḻaimuṟiyil Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭu Iṭai yāṟṟumaṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkal perāl Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai yil vilai koṇṭa
pramāṇappaṭi nilam muppatiṟṟu veli nālāvatu kār mutalukku kaḻitta nilam Irupattu Aiyveli nikki nālāvatu mutal kaḻitta nilam Aiy veliyum tāṅkaḷ veṇṭum (p)payir ceytu koṇṭu
Ivaiyiṉāl Uḷḷa nel kaṭamaiy kācu kaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayir kaṭamaiyum Āyamum Aṉaittu Upātikaḷum Ivaiyiṟṟukku Uḷḷa samasta prāptikaḷum Uḻpaṭa Udaka pūrvamāka bhūdāna
Iṟaiyiliyāka tantaruḷiṉa paṭiye niccayippil kaḻittuviṭṭatu . Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉupavittu potuka § Ivai tuṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Iṉnilam Aivelikkum Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Iṉnilam Aivelikkum muṉaiya taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Iṉnilam Aivelikkum Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Innilam Aivelikkum Ivai vira pāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai perunallūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Innilam Aivelikkum Ivai muṇṭāṟuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyap pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Iṉnilam Aivelikkum Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
